evals.name: valid-skill-check
evals.prompt: 验证这个技能的frontmatter和CSO质量：skills/ecf/SKILL.md。输出验证报告。
assertions: Output includes '🔍 Skill Quality Verification' header
Output shows 'PASS' for frontmatter name check
Output shows 'PASS' for frontmatter description check
Output shows 'PASS' for CSO 'Use when' check
Output shows 'PASS' for Overview section check
Output shows 'PASS' for When to Use section check
Final result shows 'PASS'

evals.name: invalid-frontmatter
evals.prompt: 验证这个技能文件的质量。技能路径：skills/ecf-workspace/test-skill-invalid/SKILL.md。该技能的name字段包含括号，description超过500字符。输出验证报告。
evals.expected_output: 验证失败，检测到frontmatter格式错误
assertions: Output shows 'FAIL' for frontmatter name format check
Output shows error message about parentheses or special chars
Output shows 'FAIL' for description length check
Final result shows 'FAIL'
Violations list includes name format error

evals.name: cso-violation
evals.prompt: 验证这个技能的description CSO质量。技能路径：skills/ecf-workspace/test-skill-cso-violation/SKILL.md。该技能的description描述了workflow流程而非触发条件。输出验证报告。
assertions: Output shows 'FAIL' for CSO check
Output shows error about workflow summary in description
Output mentions 'description must describe triggers, not workflow'
Final result shows 'FAIL'

evals.name: missing-structure
evals.prompt: 验证这个技能的内容结构。技能路径：skills/ecf-workspace/test-skill-no-structure/SKILL.md。该技能缺少Overview和When to Use部分。输出验证报告。
evals.expected_output: 验证失败，检测到结构缺失
assertions: Output shows 'FAIL' for Overview section check
Output shows 'FAIL' for When to Use section check
Output shows error about missing required sections
Final result shows 'FAIL'

evals.name: output-format-check
evals.prompt: 验证skills/ecf/SKILL.md的质量，检查输出格式是否使用简洁的元素列表而非冗长的ASCII模板。
evals.expected_output: 验证报告使用紧凑格式输出
assertions: Output format uses compact symbols (✅/❌)
Output includes structured sections (Frontmatter, CSO, Content)
Total output length is reasonable (under 500 chars for simple skill)
